title: Crispy Peruvian Chicken Quesadilla
description: A fresh, gooey, festive dish that blends Peruvian flavors with a crispy quesadilla. Highprotein, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Preheat a non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat.
In a bowl, combine shredded chicken with 60 ml of enchilada sauce, lime juice, salt, and pepper; toss to coat.
Warm each tortilla in a microwave for 20 seconds or on a dry pan for 5 seconds to make it pliable.
Spread 2 tbsp of the remaining enchilada sauce onto each tortilla, then top with the chicken mixture, crumbled queso fresco, and chopped cilantro.
Fold the tortillas over the filling to form a half‑moon shape.
Brush the skillet lightly with olive oil and place one quesadilla in the pan; cook 2‑3 minutes until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip carefully and cook the other side for another 2‑3 minutes until crisp and cheese has melted.
Remove the quesadilla, let it rest 1 minute, then slice into wedges.
Garnish with extra cilantro and lime wedges, and serve hot.
Enjoy with a side of fresh corn or a light salad if desired.
